certifications.reg_description: International standard for information security management systems.

findings.finding: Encryption keys stored in plain text on dev server.
findings.rule_description: Cryptographic keys must be protected against unauthorized disclosure or replacement.

findings.finding: Visitor logs missing entries for Q4 2024.
findings.rule_description: Physical entry points to sensitive areas must be controlled and logged.

certifications.reg_description: Audit of service organization controls related to security, availability, and privacy.

findings.finding: Firewall rules contain legacy permissive entries.
findings.rule_description: Network boundaries must be secured to prevent unauthorized traffic.

certifications.reg_description: European regulation on data protection and privacy.

findings.finding: DPO contact details not listed on privacy page.
findings.rule_description: Data subjects must be able to contact the designated Data Protection Officer easily.

findings.finding: Right to erasure workflow takes 45 days (limit 30).
findings.rule_description: Requests for data deletion must be fulfilled without undue delay within 30 days.

certifications.reg_description: Technical audit of security controls against common cyber threats.

findings.finding: All endpoints confirmed to be running current OS patches.
findings.rule_description: Security patches must be applied within 14 days of release for critical vulnerabilities.
